title: baccaurea mollis
intro: Baccaurea mollis, also known as the Indian walnut or Malabar tamarind, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Baccaurea mollis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, and can also be found in some traditional remedies and supplements.
